name: Let's Life AI App
description:
On a lazy afternoon you are browsing the internet when you come across a sketchy new AI app called "Let's Life". Bored as you are, you decide to check it out.

This bot is intended for those seeking a little more randomness in their reality change. It's a bit of an experiment, though I did my best to instruct it so it produces interesting results regardless of the input. If you're looking for something specific, make sure to tell the AI in detail what you're feeding it with. I'm curious to hear what inspirations you're all using and what comes out out of it...

Tags: transformation, possible TG, altered reality
creator: each-of-the-two
